title: orthanthera butayei
intro: Orthanthera butayei, also known as the Butayei plant or Buta plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Orthanthera butayei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various infections, making it a valuable herb in folk medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water to release its medicinal properties.
